subject: a decaying ghoul/zombie lurching forward through bare winter trees, a silver implement embedded near its shoulder
description: A ghoul or zombie figure lurches toward the viewer in a wide action stance. The figure wears the tattered remnants of a dark coat and trousers, with chains visible around the neck. The flesh is rotted and discolored, the mouth gaping open wide. The hands are raised — bloody or gore-covered at the fingers. A silver blade or needle is clearly visible embedded near the figure's upper torso or shoulder. Bare, skeletal tree branches fill the upper background, and the sky behind grades from dull reddish warmth near the horizon to cold dark above. The overall palette is grey, black, and dark red.
foreground: decaying ghoul lunging forward, clawed hands raised, gaping mouth
background: bare leafless trees, twilight sky with dark-red horizon
emotion: snarling, aggressive — lunging posture, mouth open, arms raised
